source: From Nx/setup/toolchain session: toolchain manifest, Nx declaration, setup script improvements.

tickets.title: [X Platform][medium] Add single toolchain manifest
tickets.description:
## Problem
Toolchain versions are scattered: Node in .nvmrc, package.json engines, scripts/verify, scripts/deploy-preflight (20.19 vs 24.14); buf in package.json; Go/Rust in CI only; Python not declared. No single source of truth.

## Scope
- Create toolchain.json (or .toolchain) with node, buf, go, rust, python, nx versions.
- Update scripts/setup.sh, scripts/verify, scripts/deploy-preflight to read from manifest.
- Update .github/workflows to use manifest where applicable.

## Affected files
- New: toolchain.json
- scripts/setup.sh
- scripts/verify
- scripts/deploy-preflight
- .github/workflows/*.yml

## Validation
- Single file defines all tool versions; setup and verify use it.

## Category
medium

tickets.title: [X Platform][medium] Declare Nx in toolchain and setup
tickets.description:
## Problem
Nx is used (project.json, sdk.sh) but not in package.json devDependencies. setup.sh does not verify Nx. Lockfile has nx transitively but it's not explicitly declared.

## Scope
- Add nx to package.json devDependencies with pinned version (e.g. ^22.5.4).
- Add verify_nx step to scripts/setup.sh (check node_modules/.bin/nx or PATH).
- Include nx in toolchain manifest if created.

## Affected files
- package.json
- scripts/setup.sh
- toolchain.json (if created)

## Validation
- npm install yields nx in node_modules; setup.sh verifies nx.

## Category
medium

tickets.title: [X Platform][minor] Align Node version across scripts
tickets.description:
## Problem
scripts/deploy-preflight has REQUIRED_NODE=20.19.0; .nvmrc and scripts/verify use 24.14.0. Inconsistent.

## Scope
- Align all scripts to use .nvmrc or a single REQUIRED_NODE constant.
- Update deploy-preflight to match .nvmrc (24.14.0) or document why it differs.

## Affected files
- scripts/deploy-preflight
- scripts/verify
- scripts/setup.sh

## Validation
- All scripts reference same Node version.

## Category
minor
